source_note: R64 matchup analysis regenerated 2026-03-18. Metrics from Sports Reference 2026 advanced school stats (fetched 2026-03-17). win_prob computed via logistic model: P(top) = 1/(1+10^(-srs_diff/10)), capped at [0.01, 0.99]. last_10 set to null (no verified game-by-game data). Reasoning, pros, cons derived from verified SRS, pace, eFG%, TOV%, ORB%, FTR, record, and SOS only.
